title: Query failed to run by returning code of 504
excerpt:
Hey everyone, 
We are getting error when trying to query board items. Same query was working last week. 
Error: 
Query failed to run by returning code of 504

posts.author: mehmet (mehmet)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mehmet - welcome!

I have a few troubleshooting questions on my end so we can further assist with this. If you wouldn’t mind answering the following:

  • is this error happening consistently - or does it happen sporadically?
  • does this happen on all other boards, or just this one?
  • how many items are on the board in the query above?

Look forward to hearing from you!
-Daniel
